name: Budapest (Hungary)

colors.symbolism: the field of the city arms
the field of the city arms

description: A banner-of-arms flag of Budapest combining the historical arms of Buda and Pest with golden details, charged with the city's coat of arms.
history: Budapest is the capital of Hungary, formed in 1873 by the unification of Buda, Óbuda, and Pest. Its flag and arms incorporate motifs from the predecessor cities.

features.symbolism: Banner-of-arms of Budapest combining the heraldic charges of Buda and Pest
